x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Examines the C# code for dead code in the comments.

options.name: inputs
options.description: Glob patterns of the files to be inspected

options.name: excludes
options.description: Glob patterns of the files to be excluded from inspection

options.name: remove
options.description: If set, removes the comments suspected to contain dead code

options.name: output
options.description: Select output format. Possible values: list-comments (default), count-by-file
